comments.author: @cricketepicmoments
comments.text: Cousin Marriage country Pakistan 😂 All are converted hindus 🎉

comments.author: @EpicAdventureWorld
comments.text: Spending time in Pakistan completely shifted my perspective. The kindness from strangers, the food, the landscapes and none of it matched what I expected before going. Drop a comment if you've ever had a country surprise you like this. 👇
